vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

verify.value: All required fields are present.

risk.desc: The base plate may not withstand the peak torque of 100Nm as required.
risk.mit: Conduct a stress analysis and adjust material or geometry as necessary.

risk.desc: Thermal dissipation fins may not be sufficient to maintain the base plate temperature below 80C.
risk.mit: Increase the size or number of thermal dissipation fins and re-run thermal analysis.

risk.desc: The rotary joint may bind during full 180deg rotation.
risk.mit: Review joint design and tolerances to ensure smooth operation.

risk.desc: The motor mounting pattern may not provide adequate electrical connection.
risk.mit: Ensure the motor mounting pattern is correctly aligned with the motor's electrical connectors.

risk.desc: The cable entry grommet may not protect cables from mechanical damage.
risk.mit: Evaluate the cable entry grommet design and ensure it provides adequate protection.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

physics_paths.description: Payload force is transmitted through the arm to the base plate via the harmonic drive and rotary joint.
Heat generated by the harmonic drive is dissipated through the base plate to the environment.
Rotary motion from the motor is transferred to the arm via the rotary joint.

integration_opportunities.description: Base plate integrates the mounting holes and cable entry, ensuring a robust and serviceable base.
Motor mount ensures secure electrical connection.
Cable entry grommet protects cables from mechanical damage.

verification_focus.description: Verify the base plate can withstand the peak torque of 100Nm.
Verify thermal dissipation fins can maintain the base plate temperature below 80C.
Verify the rotary joint can achieve full 180deg rotation without binding.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to motor heat transfer.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks or cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of cable pinch during joint motion.
risk.mit: Ensure cable harness has slack loops and strain relief at both ends.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Use precise alignment tools and follow assembly sequence carefully.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload on critical joints.
risk.mit: Verify preload intent and ensure proper torque application.

risk.desc: Risk of material fatigue due to cyclic loading.
risk.mit: Conduct fatigue analysis and select appropriate materials and processes.

physics_paths.path: from J1 to J2, then to J3
motor torque -> harmonic drive -> shoulder pitch axis
cable spine through center bore of J2
data cables through J2 center bore

adjacent_interfaces.assembly_order_hint: align J1 to J2, then fasten
align J3 to J2, then snap fit
align base to J2, then clamp

generated_parts.label: Cable Management Spine
generated_parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

requirements: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic
External or inspectable harness spine with slack loops at every joint; connection types and load-path closure
Cable spine clips externally or remains inspectable through open channels
Joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links
Harness crossing each joint has slack loop, strain relief at both ends, and routing that avoids pinch points through the full motion range
Every inter-part interface names a specific connection type with its DOF and a numeric clearance
Parts can be installed in a stated order where every fastener, connector, and mating feature stays reachable
One primary datum part anchors the assembly; each other part locates off a named parent datum using a 3-2-1 scheme
Every part's primary load traces through named interfaces to the base/ground
Design moves the right direction: fewer interfaces, parts consolidated where service is preserved, open load paths closed, and redundancy added only at critical joints
The assembly uses the fewest interfaces that still allow service and manufacture; each remaining interface is justified by service, motion, manufacture split, or load transfer
P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets
Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, drill, subtract, pocket
Dimensions match robot_arm scale: 80-400mm per link, 600-1200mm reach
Interfaces have no tolerance or fit specification
Assembly order is unstated or impossible
Assembly sequence and disassembly sequence for field-serviceable parts
Boundary_conditions with fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces

risk.desc: Risk of mis-mating connectors due to lack of keying.

risk.desc: Potential for assembly sequence errors due to ambiguous steps.
risk.mit: Clarify assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.

risk.desc: Risk of uncontrolled tolerance stack-up.
